'''鈭歴h-l-k-r''' ('''kashalkeroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lusk|lusk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-l-k-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lusk|lusk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-l-k-r
|-
! Lemma
| kashalkeroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishalkeroko|thishalkeroko]] || [[word:jishalkeroko|jishalkeroko]] || [[word:shishalkeroko|shishalkeroko]] || [[word:kishalkeroko|kishalkeroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushalkeroko|thuthushalkeroko]] || [[word:jujushalkeroko|jujushalkeroko]] || [[word:shushushalkeroko|shushushalkeroko]] || [[word:kukushalkeroko|kukushalkeroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushalkeroko|thushalkeroko]] || [[word:jushalkeroko|jushalkeroko]] || [[word:shushalkeroko|shushalkeroko]] || [[word:kushalkeroko|kushalkeroko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshalkeroko|thothoshalkeroko]] || [[word:jojoshalkeroko|jojoshalkeroko]] || [[word:shoshoshalkeroko|shoshoshalkeroko]] || [[word:kokoshalkeroko|kokoshalkeroko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshalkeroko|thoshalkeroko]] || [[word:joshalkeroko|joshalkeroko]] || [[word:shoshalkeroko|shoshalkeroko]] || [[word:koshalkeroko|koshalkeroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙shalkeroko|th忙shalkeroko]] || [[word:j忙shalkeroko|j忙shalkeroko]] || [[word:sh忙shalkeroko|sh忙shalkeroko]] || [[word:k忙shalkeroko|k忙shalkeroko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashalkeroko|thashalkeroko]] || [[word:jashalkeroko|jashalkeroko]] || [[word:shashalkeroko|shashalkeroko]] || [[word:kashalkeroko|kashalkeroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashalkeroko|thashalkeroko]] || [[word:jashalkeroko|jashalkeroko]] || [[word:shashalkeroko|shashalkeroko]] || [[word:kashalkeroko|kashalkeroko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
